section.heading: Authority of Export Administration Act of 1979
section.chapeau: Nothing in sections 620 to 620j of this title shall be construed to—

paragraph.content: prejudice the outcome of pending or prospective petitions filed under, or
warrant the exercise of the authority contained in,

section.continuation: section 7 11 See References in Text note below. of the Export Administration Act of 1979 with respect to the export of unprocessed timber.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 7 of the Export Administration Act of 1979, referred to in text, is section 7 of Pub. L. 96–72, Sept. 29, 1979, 93 Stat. 515, which was classified to section 4606 of Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 115–232, div. A, title XVII, § 1766(a), Aug. 13, 2018, 132 Stat. 2232.
